Basic Demos

Carousel values​

Overview demo: horizontal carousel with CSS-unit gap, smooth interpolation, and per-slide progress.

Key props: gap: "1rem", lerp: 0.1, duration: 750, origin: "center", loop: true.

Also reads track accessors in the update callback — current, target, min, max, influence, and each slide's progress.

HTML
<div class="fullpage-center">
  <div class="info">
    <div>Current: <span data-value-current></span></div>
    <div>Target: <span data-value-target></span></div>
    <div>Min: <span data-value-min></span></div>
    <div>Max: <span data-value-max></span></div>
    <div>Loop: <span data-value-loop></span></div>
    <div>Impulse: <span data-value-impulse></span></div>
    <div>Interpolating: <span data-value-interpolating></span></div>
    <div>Idle: <span data-value-idle></span></div>
  </div>

  <div class="carousel" id="carousel">
    <div class="slide">
      <div class="slide-wrap" data-snap-parallax-x="-50%" data-snap-parallax-x-scope="none" data-snap-parallax-x-impulse="3">
        <div>Slide 1</div>
        <div data-progress>0%</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="slide">
      <div class="slide-wrap" data-snap-parallax-x="-50%" data-snap-parallax-x-scope="none" data-snap-parallax-x-impulse="3">
        <div>Slide 2</div>
        <div data-progress>0%</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="slide">
      <div class="slide-wrap" data-snap-parallax-x="-50%" data-snap-parallax-x-scope="none" data-snap-parallax-x-impulse="3">
        <div>Slide 3</div>
        <div data-progress>0%</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="slide">
      <div class="slide-wrap" data-snap-parallax-x="-50%" data-snap-parallax-x-scope="none" data-snap-parallax-x-impulse="3">
        <div>Slide 4</div>
        <div data-progress>0%</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="slide">
      <div class="slide-wrap" data-snap-parallax-x="-50%" data-snap-parallax-x-scope="none" data-snap-parallax-x-impulse="3">
        <div>Slide 5</div>
        <div data-progress>0%</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="slide">
      <div class="slide-wrap" data-snap-parallax-x="-50%" data-snap-parallax-x-scope="none" data-snap-parallax-x-impulse="3">
        <div>Slide 6</div>
        <div data-progress>0%</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="slide">
      <div class="slide-wrap" data-snap-parallax-x="-50%" data-snap-parallax-x-scope="none" data-snap-parallax-x-impulse="3">
        <div>Slide 7</div>
        <div data-progress>0%</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
CSS
.info {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  width: 80%;
  gap: 0.5rem;

  font-size: 0.875rem;

  >* {
    &:nth-child(2n + 2) {
      text-align: right;
    }
  }
}

.carousel {
  --size: max(25vw, 25vh);

  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
  height: var(--size);

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  width: var(--size);
  height: 100%;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}

.slide-wrap {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  text-align: center;

  gap: 1rem;
  padding: 1rem;
  border-radius: 1rem;

  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}

.slide [data-progress] {
  width: 100%;
  padding-top: 1rem;
  border-top: 1px solid currentColor;
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap,
  EaseOutBack
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const valueCurrent = document.querySelector("[data-value-current]");
const valueTarget = document.querySelector("[data-value-target]");
const valueMin = document.querySelector("[data-value-min]");
const valueMax = document.querySelector("[data-value-max]");
const valueLoop = document.querySelector("[data-value-loop]");
const valueImpulse = document.querySelector("[data-value-impulse]");
const valueInterpolating = document.querySelector("[data-value-interpolating]");
const valueIdle = document.querySelector("[data-value-idle]");

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  gap: "1rem",
  lerp: 0.1,
  duration: 750,
  easing: EaseOutBack,
  grabCursor: true,
  freemode: "sticky",
  origin: "center",
  loop: true
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.slides.forEach(({
  element
}) => {
  element.progressElement = element.querySelector("[data-progress]");
});

carousel.on("update", () => {
  valueCurrent.innerHTML = carousel.current.toFixed(2);
  valueTarget.innerHTML = carousel.target.toFixed(2);
  valueMin.innerHTML = carousel.min.toFixed(2);
  valueMax.innerHTML = carousel.max.toFixed(2);
  valueLoop.innerHTML = carousel.loopCount;
  valueImpulse.innerHTML = carousel.impulse.toFixed(2);
  valueInterpolating.innerHTML = carousel.isInterpolating;
  valueIdle.innerHTML = carousel.isIdle;

  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord,
    progress,
    index
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(${coord}px, 0)`;

    const percent = (progress * 100).toFixed(0);

    element.progressElement.innerHTML = `${percent}%`;
  });
});

carousel.on("idle", () => {
  valueIdle.innerHTML = carousel.isIdle;
});
Open live demo ↗

Default active index​

Start on a specific slide with activeIndex: 1 — a zero-based slide index.

HTML
<div class="fullpage-center">
  <div class="carousel" id="carousel">
    <div class="slide">1</div>
    <div class="slide">2</div>
    <div class="slide">3</div>
    <div class="slide">4</div>
    <div class="slide">5</div>
    <div class="slide">6</div>
    <div class="slide">7</div>
  </div>
</div>
CSS
.fullpage-center {
  padding-inline: 1.25rem;
}

.carousel {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;

  height: 50vw;
  max-height: 50vh;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  height: 100%;
  width: 75%;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  activeIndex: 1,
  gap: "1.25rem"
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.on("update", () => {
  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord,
    isVisible
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(${coord}px, 0)`;
  });
});
Open live demo ↗

Variable size​

Slides can have different widths or heights. Some slides may be wider than the container and scroll with inertia.

HTML
<div class="fullpage-center">
  <div class="carousel" id="carousel">
    <div class="slide" style="min-width: 200px;">1</div>
    <div class="slide" style="min-width: 300px;">2</div>
    <div class="slide" style="min-width: 400px;">3</div>
    <div class="slide" style="min-width: 150vw;">4</div>
    <div class="slide" style="min-width: 150px;">5</div>
    <div class="slide" style="min-width: 200px">6</div>
    <div class="slide" style="min-width: 300px">7</div>
  </div>
</div>
CSS
.fullpage-center {
  padding-inline: 1.25rem;
}

.carousel {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;

  height: 50vw;
  max-height: 50vh;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  height: 100%;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  gap: "1.25rem"
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.on("update", () => {
  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord,
    isVisible
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(${coord}px, 0)`;
  });
});
Open live demo ↗

Vertical​

Vertical carousel with direction: "vertical".

HTML
<div class="wrapper">
  <div class="carousel" id="carousel">
    <div class="slide">1</div>
    <div class="slide">2</div>
    <div class="slide">3</div>
    <div class="slide">4</div>
    <div class="slide">5</div>
    <div class="slide">6</div>
    <div class="slide">7</div>
  </div>
</div>
CSS
.wrapper {
  display: grid;
  padding: 1rem;
  height: 100svh;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.carousel {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  gap: "1rem",
  direction: "vertical"
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.on("update", () => {
  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord,
    isVisible
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(0, ${coord}px)`;
  });
});
Open live demo ↗

Origin​

Align snap magnets with origin: "center". Equivalent to the deprecated centered: true.

HTML
<div class="fullpage-center">
  <div class="carousel" id="carousel">
    <div class="slide">1</div>
    <div class="slide">2</div>
    <div class="slide">3</div>
    <div class="slide">4</div>
    <div class="slide">5</div>
    <div class="slide">6</div>
    <div class="slide">7</div>
  </div>
</div>
CSS
.fullpage-center {
  padding-inline: 1.25rem;
}

.carousel {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;

  height: 50vw;
  max-height: 50vh;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  height: 100%;
  width: 30%;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  gap: 20,
  origin: "center"
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.on("update", () => {
  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord,
    isVisible
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(${coord}px, 0)`;
  });
});
Open live demo ↗

Origin end​

Align snap magnets with origin: "end" — the trailing edge of each slide sticks to the trailing edge of the container.

HTML
<div class="fullpage-center">
  <div class="carousel" id="carousel">
    <div class="slide">1</div>
    <div class="slide">2</div>
    <div class="slide">3</div>
    <div class="slide">4</div>
    <div class="slide">5</div>
    <div class="slide">6</div>
    <div class="slide">7</div>
  </div>
</div>
CSS
.fullpage-center {
  padding-inline: 1.25rem;
}

.carousel {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;

  height: 50vw;
  max-height: 50vh;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  height: 100%;
  width: 30%;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  gap: "1.25rem",
  origin: "end"
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.on("update", () => {
  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord,
    isVisible
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(${coord}px, 0)`;
  });
});
Open live demo ↗

Loop​

Infinite carousel with loop: true.

HTML
<div class="fullpage-center">
  <div class="carousel" id="carousel">
    <div class="slide">1</div>
    <div class="slide">2</div>
    <div class="slide">3</div>
    <div class="slide">4</div>
    <div class="slide">5</div>
    <div class="slide">6</div>
    <div class="slide">7</div>
  </div>
</div>
CSS
.fullpage-center {
  padding-inline: 1.25rem;
}

.carousel {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;

  height: 50vw;
  max-height: 50vh;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  height: 100%;
  width: 30%;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  gap: 20,
  origin: "center",
  loop: true
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.on("update", () => {
  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord,
    isVisible
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(${coord}px, 0)`;
  });
});
Open live demo ↗

Gap​

Spacing between slides via gap. Accepts CSS units such as px, rem, vw, vh, and svh.

Example: gap: "10vw".

HTML
<div class="fullpage-center">
  <div class="carousel" id="carousel">
    <div class="slide">1</div>
    <div class="slide">2</div>
    <div class="slide">3</div>
    <div class="slide">4</div>
    <div class="slide">5</div>
    <div class="slide">6</div>
    <div class="slide">7</div>
  </div>
</div>
CSS
.fullpage-center {
  padding-inline: 1.25rem;
}

.carousel {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;

  height: 50vw;
  max-height: 50vh;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  height: 100%;
  width: 30%;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  gap: "10vw"
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.on("update", () => {
  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord,
    isVisible
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(${coord}px, 0)`;
  });
});
Open live demo ↗

Grab cursor​

Show grab/grabbing cursor during interaction with grabCursor: true.

HTML
<div class="fullpage-center">
  <div class="carousel" id="carousel">
    <div class="slide">1</div>
    <div class="slide">2</div>
    <div class="slide">3</div>
    <div class="slide">4</div>
    <div class="slide">5</div>
    <div class="slide">6</div>
    <div class="slide">7</div>
  </div>
</div>
CSS
.fullpage-center {
  padding-inline: 1.25rem;
}

.carousel {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;

  height: 50vw;
  max-height: 50vh;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  height: 100%;
  width: 30%;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  gap: "1.25rem",
  grabCursor: true
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.on("update", () => {
  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord,
    isVisible
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(${coord}px, 0)`;
  });
});
Open live demo ↗

Wheel​

Horizontal carousel controlled by the mouse wheel. Enable with wheel: true and wheelAxis: "y". Slides snap to magnets when wheeling stops.

HTML
<div class="fullpage-center">
  <div class="carousel" id="carousel">
    <div class="slide">1</div>
    <div class="slide">2</div>
    <div class="slide">3</div>
    <div class="slide">4</div>
    <div class="slide">5</div>
    <div class="slide">6</div>
    <div class="slide">7</div>
  </div>
</div>
CSS
.fullpage-center {
  padding-inline: 1.25rem;
}

.carousel {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;

  height: 50vw;
  max-height: 50vh;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  height: 100%;
  width: 30%;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  gap: "1.25rem",
  wheel: true,
  wheelAxis: "y",
  grabCursor: true
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.on("update", () => {
  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord,
    isVisible
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(${coord}px, 0)`;
  });
});
Open live demo ↗

Free wheel​

Magnetic snapping while swiping, but free scrolling on wheel release via stickOnWheelEnd: false.

HTML
<div class="fullpage-center">
  <div class="carousel" id="carousel">
    <div class="slide">1</div>
    <div class="slide">2</div>
    <div class="slide">3</div>
    <div class="slide">4</div>
    <div class="slide">5</div>
    <div class="slide">6</div>
    <div class="slide">7</div>
  </div>
</div>
CSS
.fullpage-center {
  padding-inline: 1.25rem;
}

.carousel {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;

  height: 50vw;
  max-height: 50vh;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  height: 100%;
  width: 30%;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  gap: "1.25rem",
  wheel: true,
  wheelAxis: "y",
  stickOnWheelEnd: false,
  grabCursor: true
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.on("update", () => {
  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord,
    isVisible
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(${coord}px, 0)`;
  });
});
Open live demo ↗

Throttled wheel​

With followWheel: false, wheel input is throttled automatically so one gesture does not skip multiple slides.

HTML
<div class="wrapper">
  <div class="carousel" id="carousel">
    <div class="slide">1</div>
    <div class="slide">2</div>
    <div class="slide">3</div>
    <div class="slide">4</div>
    <div class="slide">5</div>
    <div class="slide">6</div>
    <div class="slide">7</div>
  </div>
</div>
CSS
.wrapper {
  display: grid;
  padding: 1rem;
  height: 100svh;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.carousel {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  gap: "1rem",
  direction: "vertical",
  wheel: true,
  followWheel: false,
  grabCursor: true
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.on("update", () => {
  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord,
    isVisible
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(0, ${coord}px)`;
  });
});
Open live demo ↗

Throttled wheel by time​

Time-based wheel throttling with followWheel: false and wheelThrottle: 100 — wheel input is blocked for 100ms after each slide change, including during transitions.

HTML
<div class="wrapper">
  <div class="carousel" id="carousel">
    <div class="slide">1</div>
    <div class="slide">2</div>
    <div class="slide">3</div>
    <div class="slide">4</div>
    <div class="slide">5</div>
    <div class="slide">6</div>
    <div class="slide">7</div>
  </div>
</div>
CSS
.wrapper {
  display: grid;
  padding: 1rem;
  height: 100svh;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.carousel {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  gap: "1rem  ",
  direction: "vertical",
  wheel: true,
  followWheel: false,
  wheelThrottle: 100,
  grabCursor: true
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.on("update", () => {
  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord,
    isVisible
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(0, ${coord}px)`;
  });
});
Open live demo ↗

Hypersmooth​

Very smooth motion with low lerp and long duration. Example: lerp: 0.05.

HTML
<div class="fullpage-center">
  <div class="carousel" id="carousel">
    <div class="slide">1</div>
    <div class="slide">2</div>
    <div class="slide">3</div>
    <div class="slide">4</div>
    <div class="slide">5</div>
    <div class="slide">6</div>
    <div class="slide">7</div>
  </div>
</div>
CSS
.fullpage-center {
  padding-inline: 1.25rem;
}

.carousel {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;

  height: 50vw;
  max-height: 50vh;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  height: 100%;
  width: 30%;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  gap: "1.25rem",
  wheel: true,
  wheelAxis: "y",
  lerp: 0.05,
  duration: 1500,
  grabCursor: true,
  freemode: true
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.on("update", () => {
  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord,
    isVisible
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(${coord}px, 0)`;
  });
});
Open live demo ↗

Freemode​

Free scrolling with inertia via freemode: true. When loop: false, movement bounces at the track edges.

HTML
<div class="fullpage-center">
  <div class="carousel" id="carousel">
    <div class="slide">1</div>
    <div class="slide">2</div>
    <div class="slide">3</div>
    <div class="slide" style="width: 150vw">4</div>
    <div class="slide">5</div>
    <div class="slide">6</div>
    <div class="slide">7</div>
  </div>
</div>
CSS
.fullpage-center {
  padding-inline: 1.25rem;
}

.carousel {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;

  height: 50vw;
  max-height: 50vh;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  height: 100%;
  width: 30%;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  gap: "1.25rem",
  grabCursor: true,
  freemode: true,
  wheel: true,
  wheelAxis: "y"
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.on("update", () => {
  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord,
    isVisible
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(${coord}px, 0)`;
  });
});
Open live demo ↗

Sticky freemode​

Combines freemode inertia with magnetic snapping at the end of the gesture: freemode: "sticky".

Movement stays within bounds and always settles on the nearest slide magnet when inertia ends.

HTML
<div class="fullpage-center">
  <div class="carousel" id="carousel">
    <div class="slide">1</div>
    <div class="slide">2</div>
    <div class="slide">3</div>
    <div class="slide" style="width: 150vw">4</div>
    <div class="slide">5</div>
    <div class="slide">6</div>
    <div class="slide">7</div>
  </div>
</div>
CSS
.fullpage-center {
  padding-inline: 1.25rem;
}

.carousel {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;

  height: 50vw;
  max-height: 50vh;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  height: 100%;
  width: 30%;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  gap: "1.25rem",
  grabCursor: true,
  freemode: "sticky",
  wheel: true,
  wheelAxis: "y",
  shortSwipes: false
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.on("update", () => {
  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord,
    isVisible
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(${coord}px, 0)`;
  });
});
Open live demo ↗

Rewind​

Wrap-around navigation without looping the track: rewind: true. Works when loop: false — from the last slide, next goes to the first, and vice versa.

HTML
<div class="fullpage-center">
  <div class="carousel" id="carousel">
    <div class="slide">1</div>
    <div class="slide">2</div>
    <div class="slide">3</div>
    <div class="slide">4</div>
    <div class="slide">5</div>
    <div class="slide">6</div>
    <div class="slide">7</div>
  </div>
</div>
CSS
.fullpage-center {
  padding-inline: 1.25rem;
}

.carousel {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;

  height: 50vw;
  max-height: 50vh;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  height: 100%;
  width: 50%;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  gap: "1.25rem",
  rewind: true,
  grabCursor: true
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.on("update", () => {
  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord,
    isVisible
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(${coord}px, 0)`;
  });
});
Open live demo ↗

Friction​

Add resistance during wheel and swipe interactions with friction: 0.3 and swipeFriction: true. Pulls movement toward slide magnets.

HTML
<div class="fullpage-center">
  <div class="carousel" id="carousel">
    <div class="slide">1</div>
    <div class="slide">2</div>
    <div class="slide">3</div>
    <div class="slide">4</div>
    <div class="slide">5</div>
    <div class="slide">6</div>
    <div class="slide">7</div>
  </div>
</div>
CSS
.fullpage-center {
  padding-inline: 1.25rem;
}

.carousel {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;

  height: 50vw;
  max-height: 50vh;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  height: 100%;
  width: 45%;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  gap: "1.25rem",
  wheel: true,
  grabCursor: true,
  wheelAxis: "y",
  lerp: 0.2,
  friction: 0.3,
  swipeFriction: true,
  stickOnWheelEnd: false
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.on("update", () => {
  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord,
    isVisible
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(${coord}px, 0)`;
  });
});
Open live demo ↗

Edge friction​

Extra resistance near the carousel edges. Enabled by default — override with edgeFriction: 0.25.

HTML
<div class="fullpage-center">
  <div class="carousel" id="carousel">
    <div class="slide">1</div>
    <div class="slide">2</div>
    <div class="slide">3</div>
    <div class="slide">4</div>
    <div class="slide">5</div>
    <div class="slide">6</div>
    <div class="slide">7</div>
  </div>
</div>
CSS
.fullpage-center {
  padding-inline: 1.25rem;
}

.carousel {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;

  height: 50vw;
  max-height: 50vh;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  height: 100%;
  width: 45%;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  gap: "1.25rem",
  edgeFriction: 0.25,
  grabCursor: true
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.on("update", () => {
  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord,
    isVisible
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(${coord}px, 0)`;
  });
});
Open live demo ↗

Interval​

Auto-advance slides with interval: 500 — moves to the next slide 500ms after each transition ends.

HTML
<div class="fullpage-center">
  <div class="carousel" id="carousel">
    <div class="slide">1</div>
    <div class="slide">2</div>
    <div class="slide">3</div>
    <div class="slide">4</div>
    <div class="slide">5</div>
    <div class="slide">6</div>
    <div class="slide">7</div>
  </div>
</div>
CSS
.fullpage-center {
  padding-inline: 1.25rem;
}

.carousel {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;

  height: 50vw;
  max-height: 50vh;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  height: 100%;
  width: 45%;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  gap: '1.25rem',
  origin: "center",
  loop: true,
  grabCursor: true,
  interval: 500
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.on("update", () => {
  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord,
    isVisible
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(${coord}px, 0)`;
  });
});
Open live demo ↗

Easing​

Custom transition easing. Example: easing: EaseOutBack, duration: 850.

HTML
<div class="fullpage-center">
  <div class="carousel" id="carousel">
    <div class="slide">1</div>
    <div class="slide">2</div>
    <div class="slide">3</div>
    <div class="slide">4</div>
    <div class="slide">5</div>
    <div class="slide">6</div>
    <div class="slide">7</div>
  </div>
</div>
CSS
.fullpage-center {
  padding-inline: 1.25rem;
}

.carousel {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;

  height: 50vw;
  max-height: 50vh;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  height: 100%;
  width: 45%;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap,
  EaseOutBack
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  gap: "1.25rem",
  grabCursor: true,
  easing: EaseOutBack,
  duration: 850
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.on("update", () => {
  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord,
    isVisible
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(${coord}px, 0)`;
  });
});
Open live demo ↗

Swipe no follow​

Disable live swipe tracking so slides change only after the gesture ends: followSwipe: false.

HTML
<div class="fullpage-center">
  <div class="carousel" id="carousel">
    <div class="slide">1</div>
    <div class="slide">2</div>
    <div class="slide">3</div>
    <div class="slide">4</div>
    <div class="slide">5</div>
    <div class="slide">6</div>
    <div class="slide">7</div>
  </div>
</div>
CSS
.fullpage-center {
  padding-inline: 1.25rem;
}

.carousel {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;

  height: 50vw;
  max-height: 50vh;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  height: 100%;
  width: 45%;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  gap: "1.25rem",
  followSwipe: false,
  grabCursor: true
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.on("update", () => {
  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord,
    isVisible
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(${coord}px, 0)`;
  });
});
Open live demo ↗

Reverse swipe​

Reverse swipe direction with a negative swipeSpeed. Example: swipeSpeed: -1.

HTML
<div class="fullpage-center">
  <div class="carousel" id="carousel">
    <div class="slide">1</div>
    <div class="slide">2</div>
    <div class="slide">3</div>
    <div class="slide">4</div>
    <div class="slide">5</div>
    <div class="slide">6</div>
    <div class="slide">7</div>
  </div>
</div>
CSS
.fullpage-center {
  padding-inline: 1.25rem;
}

.carousel {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;

  height: 50vw;
  max-height: 50vh;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  height: 100%;
  width: 45%;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap,
  EaseOutBack
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  gap: "1.25rem",
  grabCursor: true,
  swipeSpeed: -1
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.on("update", () => {
  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord,
    isVisible
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(${coord}px, 0)`;
  });
});
Open live demo ↗

RTL carousel​

Manual RTL setup:

  • dir="rtl" on the container
  • swipeSpeed: -1
  • apply transforms with the opposite sign
HTML
<div class="fullpage-center">
  <div class="carousel" id="carousel" dir="rtl">
    <div class="slide">1</div>
    <div class="slide">2</div>
    <div class="slide">3</div>
    <div class="slide">4</div>
    <div class="slide">5</div>
    <div class="slide">6</div>
    <div class="slide">7</div>
  </div>
</div>
CSS
.fullpage-center {
  padding-inline: 1.25rem;
}

.carousel {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;

  height: 50vw;
  max-height: 50vh;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  right: 0;
  height: 100%;
  width: 45%;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap,
  EaseOutBack
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  gap: "1.25rem",
  grabCursor: true,
  swipeSpeed: -1
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.on("update", () => {
  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(${-coord}px, 0)`;
  });
});
Open live demo ↗

Slides to scroll​

Scroll multiple slides per interaction with slidesToScroll: 2.

HTML
<div class="fullpage-center">
  <div class="carousel" id="carousel">
    <div class="slide">1</div>
    <div class="slide">2</div>
    <div class="slide">3</div>
    <div class="slide">4</div>
    <div class="slide">5</div>
    <div class="slide">6</div>
    <div class="slide">7</div>
  </div>
</div>
CSS
.fullpage-center {
  padding-inline: 1.25rem;
}

.carousel {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;

  height: 50vw;
  max-height: 50vh;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  height: 100%;
  width: calc(50% - 0.625rem);

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  gap: "1.25rem",
  grabCursor: true,
  slidesToScroll: 2
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.on("update", () => {
  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord,
    isVisible
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(${coord}px, 0)`;
  });
});
Open live demo ↗

Adaptive Snap​

Use Responsive to change Snap props at breakpoints:

new Responsive(carousel, [
  {
    at: '@media (max-width: 768px)',
    props: {
      slidesToScroll: 1,
      followSwipe: false,
    },
  },
]);
HTML
<div class="fullpage-center">
  <div class="carousel" id="carousel">
    <div class="slide">1</div>
    <div class="slide">2</div>
    <div class="slide">3</div>
    <div class="slide">4</div>
    <div class="slide">5</div>
    <div class="slide">6</div>
    <div class="slide">7</div>
  </div>
</div>
CSS
.fullpage-center {
  padding-inline: 1.25rem;
}

.carousel {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;

  height: 50vw;
  max-height: 50vh;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  height: 100%;
  width: calc(50% - 0.625rem);

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);

  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    width: 100%;
  }
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap,
  Responsive
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  gap: "1.25rem",
  grabCursor: true,
  slidesToScroll: 2
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.on("update", () => {
  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord,
    isVisible
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(${coord}px, 0)`;
  });
});

new Responsive(carousel, [{
  at: "@media (max-width: 768px)",
  props: {
    slidesToScroll: 1,
    followSwipe: false
  }
}]);
Open live demo ↗

Progress​

Read each slide's progress and index in the update callback — useful for parallax, opacity, and 3D effects.

HTML
<div class="fullpage-center">
  <div class="carousel" id="carousel">
    <div class="slide">1</div>
    <div class="slide">2</div>
    <div class="slide">3</div>
    <div class="slide">4</div>
    <div class="slide">5</div>
    <div class="slide">6</div>
    <div class="slide">7</div>
  </div>
</div>
CSS
.fullpage-center {
  padding-inline: 1.25rem;
}

.carousel {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;

  height: 50vw;
  max-height: 50vh;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  height: 100%;
  width: 40%;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap,
  EaseOutBack
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  gap: "1.25rem",
  grabCursor: true,
  origin: "center",
  loop: true
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.on("update", () => {
  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord,
    progress,
    index
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(${coord}px, 0)`;

    element.innerHTML = `${index} / ${progress.toFixed(2)}`;
  });
});
Open live demo ↗

Virtual​

Virtual slides: pass SnapSlide instances with virtual: true. DOM nodes are created on init; only visible slides stay in the document.

HTML
<div class="fullpage-center">
  <div class="carousel" id="carousel"></div>
</div>
CSS
.fullpage-center {
  padding-inline: 1.25rem;
}

.carousel {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;

  height: 50vw;
  max-height: 50vh;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

.carousel.ready {
  opacity: 1;
}

.slide {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  height: 100%;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}
JavaScript
import {
  Snap,
  SnapSlide
} from "vevet";

const container = document.getElementById("carousel");

const createSlides = count => {
  const slides = new Array(count).fill(0).map((item, index) => {
    const size = "40vw";

    const element = document.createElement("div");
    element.className = "slide";
    element.innerHTML = `<span>${index}</span>`;
    element.style.width = size;

    return new SnapSlide(element, {
      size,
      virtual: true
    });

  });

  return slides;
};

const carousel = new Snap({
  container,
  slides: createSlides(500),
  gap: "1.25rem",
  grabCursor: true,
  loop: true,
  origin: "center"
});

container.classList.add("ready");

carousel.on("update", () => {
  carousel.slides.forEach(({
    element,
    coord,
    isVisible
  }) => {
    element.style.transform = `translate(${coord}px, 0)`;
  });
});
